judge.scope: SEMANTIC-ONLY. After the facet decomposition, the judge is given a content-only prompt (answered_substantively, no_fabrication) and is explicitly told NOT to judge formatting, length, language, lists, or paragraph structure — those are computed by code via the calibration's codeFacets. This is the re-capture that replaces the earlier contaminated run where format_constraints_met was bundled into the judge.
judge.blindness: Each verdict produced by an independent subagent given ONLY the semantic-only buildJudgePrompt() output for its case, with expected labels, rationale, kind, tier, and length count stripped, and instructed to use no tools and read no files. All four subagents reported tool_uses: 0 (genuinely blind).

result.interpretation: The decomposition resolved the earlier 3/4 failure AND, after an adversarial review, made the judge load-bearing. The semantic-only judge is CONSISTENT on the four real responses (all content-correct -> sound, including sc4, whose answer-paragraph-plus-요약 structure it previously mis-rejected — it is no longer asked about structure). Both halves of the composite are now exercised by a real negative: CODE flags sc2 (240 chars > the stated 200-char limit), and the JUDGE flags sc5 (a format-perfect response whose regression/smoke definitions are inverted — every code facet passes, so only the judge can catch it; it did, with answered_substantively=false). This closes the vacuous-judge gap the review found: an always-sound judge now FAILS this gate because sc5 would mismatch.
result.composite: verdict = AND(code format facets) AND (judge semantic verdict). sc1 sound. sc2 unsound (code within_stated_char_limit=false). sc3 sound. sc4 sound (code all-pass incl. one-paragraph body with 요약 exempt ∧ judge sound). sc5 unsound (code all-pass ∧ judge unsound — the judge is the only thing that can flag this case).

verdicts.evidence: 스모크 테스트는 '이 빌드가 최소한 동작하는가?', 회귀 테스트는 '우리가 무언가를 깼는가?' — accurately captures the core distinction with correct definitions and no invented claims.
Correctly distinguishes scope/depth/speed tradeoffs between the two test types with no fabricated claims. (Length is code's facet, not the judge's; code flags sc2 as over-limit.)
두 개념을 정확하게 구분하여 설명함. 스모크 테스트 명칭의 유래(하드웨어 전원 투입 시 연기 여부)도 사실에 부합함.
Accurately distinguishes regression testing from smoke testing. The structure the judge once mis-rejected is no longer in its scope; content is sound.

The response inverts the definitions: it claims smoke test is the comprehensive full-regression suite and regression test is the quick surface-level check; the two concepts are backwards throughout. (Format is perfect, so code passes every facet — only the judge can catch this.)
